message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Damaged and Delayed Delivery – Order #[Order Number]

Dear [Customer Service Manager Name or "Customer Support Team"],

I am writing to formally lodge a complaint regarding my recent order, #[Order Number], placed on [Date of Order]. The package was expected to arrive by [Expected Delivery Date]; however, it was not delivered until [Actual Delivery Date], resulting in a delay of two weeks. Furthermore, upon inspection, I discovered that the item(s) inside were significantly damaged.

The excessive delay has caused considerable inconvenience, as [briefly explain impact, e.g., "I needed these items for a specific event" or "I was relying on this delivery for work purposes"]. More concerning is the condition in which the package arrived. The outer box showed signs of severe mishandling, including [describe external damage, e.g., crushed corners, water damage, torn tape]. Upon opening the package, I found that the [Product Name] was [describe internal damage, e.g., cracked, broken, missing parts].

Please find attached photographic evidence of both the damaged packaging and the defective item for your reference.

Given these circumstances, I request one of the following resolutions:
1. A full refund for the order, including any shipping costs incurred.
2. A replacement of the damaged item(s) with expedited shipping at no additional cost.

I have been a loyal customer of [Company Name] for [Number] years and have always appreciated your service. However, this experience has been deeply disappointing. I expect a prompt resolution to this matter and a response within [e.g., 3-5] business days.

Thank you for your attention to this issue. I look forward to your swift reply.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Address]
[Order Number]
